newsSince: No material company-specific news in the June 9-23 window (move only +1.5%). The standing 300mm wafer capacity-expansion program (ramping toward 1.2M wafers/month) and the Okmetic Finland specialty-wafer expansion continue per plan. Watchlist materials node; nothing fundamentally changed since June 9.

sources.label: Digitimes - National Silicon to double wafer capacity (2024)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold. Wafers/SOI/high-purity materials consumed by AI fabs remain a relevant ecosystem node, but no new evidence landed since June 9 (the capacity-doubling headline is a re-surfaced 2024 item). Watchlist status persists: under-discovery vs valuation is still mixed; ~flat move confirms no catalyst.
verdicts.bull: Only meaningful Chinese 300mm-wafer scale player; localization + capacity growth supports AI-fab silicon demand.
verdicts.neutral: Useful node but single-bundle validation risk; evidence of under-discovery mixed.
verdicts.bear: +44% YTD with thin profitability; capacity story is old news; commodity wafer pricing pressure.
